final.sql:
SELECT 
    i_brand,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
WHERE 
    d_month = 1 
    AND d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    i_brand, 
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    i_brand, 
    s_store_name;
